text: Marking a parent feedback item as "Resolved" on the evaluate page should also mark all of its children/replies as done too

proposedTasks.title: Cascade resolve status from parent feedback to child replies
proposedTasks.description:
When a user marks a parent feedback item as 'Resolved' on the Evaluate page, automatically mark all of its child/reply feedback items as resolved too. Acceptance criteria:
1. When a parent FeedbackItem status is set to 'resolved', the backend iterates all FeedbackItems whose parent_id matches the resolved item's id and transitions their status to 'resolved' as well.
2. Cascading is recursive — if a reply itself has replies, those are also resolved.
3. The frontend Evaluate page reflects the cascaded resolution in real-time (via existing WebSocket relay).
4. If a child was already resolved, it remains resolved (no-op).
5. Resolving a child independently does NOT resolve the parent or siblings.
6. Add unit tests covering: single-level cascade, multi-level recursive cascade, already-resolved children, and independent child resolution.

taskTitles: Cascade resolve status from parent feedback to child replies
